fact_nuggets.text: Swarm has several referrals: Swarm (Ability), an Ability introduced in Generation III. Mass outbreak, also known as a swarm, a method of encountering Pokemon that would normally not appear in that area, or that are usually uncommon there. For the skill in Pokemon Shuffle, see Skill (Shuffle) Swarm.
Strengthens bug moves to inflict 1.5 damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
